data.title: McGraw Hill to discuss AI in education with Rothschild & Co Redburn on Oct 9, 2025 at 10:00 AM ET. Contact to register.
data.description: In Columbus today, McGraw Hill, Inc. (NYSE: MH) shared news of Dave Cortese, the Executive Vice President and Chief Digital Information Officer, set to join an expert call hosted by Rothschild & Co Redburn analyst Henry Hayden. The call is scheduled for Thursday, October 9, 2025, at 10:00 AM ET. The topic of discussion will be artificial intelligence in education. To sign up for the call, interested individuals are advised to reach out to Rothschild & Co Redburn for further instructions.

data.title: Use your Bitcoin instead of hoarding it. Spending it drives adoption. Treat it like money, not digital gold. #Cryptocurrency #Adoption
data.description: The reluctance to spend Bitcoin instead of hoarding it is hindering its adoption. To truly drive a monetary revolution, it is vital to use Bitcoin for transactions like regular currency rather than simply storing it as digital gold. This shift in mindset is imperative for the broader acceptance of Bitcoin in the global economy.

data.title: TAPFIN recognized by Everest Group for 12th year for AI investments and solutions in workforce management.
data.description: TAPFIN's dedication to innovation in AI, advisory services, and strategic offerings for Independent Contractors and Services Procurement has been acknowledged. In a recent report dated October 2, 2025, it was revealed that TAPFIN, a part of the ManpowerGroup family, continues to make significant investments in these areas. This recognition underscores the commitment TAPFIN has in enhancing its services for Independent Contractors and Services Procurement.

data.title: Dogecoin up 12% in a week. Traders cautious, still below cycle top levels. Analyst sees bullish sign.
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has seen a 12% increase in value in the last week, although experts believe it has not yet reached its peak for this cycle. Crypto analyst Kevin highlighted in a recent Patreon update that Dogecoin has managed to maintain crucial support levels, including the golden pocket, weekly bull market band, and daily 100/200 EMAs. Historically, a drop of more than 10% would have caused Dogecoin to fall below these levels, making the current stability a positive sign for bullish sentiment. In order for further growth, Bitcoin will need to surpass certain levels. Additional details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sagtec Global partners with HM Edutech Group to develop AI-powered financial data analysis platform with TP Group.
data.description: Sagtec Global Limited (NASDAQ: SAGT) has partnered with HM Edutech Group Sdn Bhd to collaborate on the development of the HMS Data Analysis System, an AI-driven SaaS platform merging financial data analytics with worldwide education solutions. This collaboration also involves TP Trader Academy Sdn Bhd. The strategic partnership was unveiled on October 2, 2025, in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. The integration of expertise from these entities aims to advance the HMS Data Analysis System, enhancing its capabilities and market presence.

data.title: "Thank You, LA" festival celebrates 50 years of Roscoe's House of Chicken N' Waffles in Los Angeles with a citywide cultural celebration.
data.description: In Los Angeles on October 2, 2025, Roscoe's House of Chicken N' Waffles revealed plans for the Thank You, LA Festival. This unique cultural celebration will commemorate 50 years of flavor, soul, and community. The event will feature a citywide festival showcasing diverse cuisines, arts, and performances.

data.title: Zurich North America integrates AI and high-res aerial imagery from Nearmap to enhance property underwriting, increasing risk assessment efficiency.
data.description: Zurich North America has integrated high-resolution aerial imagery and AI-based roof scoring technology from Nearmap into its underwriting processes to streamline risk assessment. This move aims to enhance efficiency and customize coverage based on risk levels. The company, based in Schaumburg, Illinois, announced the initiative on October 2, 2025. Zurich North America, a prominent commercial insurance provider, leverages this advanced technology to drive more effective underwriting decisions.

data.title: Tech stocks historically perform well in October, with Nasdaq 100 seeing a 2.98% gain. XLK shows a 2.77% return. Tech rallies due to Q4 strength and post-September rebounds.
data.description: Tech stocks are performing strongly in October, with the Nasdaq 100 and the Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund showing significant gains in the month. Since 1999, the Invesco QQQ Trust has averaged a 2.98% gain in October, while the XLK fund has seen a 2.77% increase. The Nasdaq 100 index has a 40-year history of positive bias in October, with an average return of 1.69% and a winning ratio of 63%. The fourth quarter is historically the strongest for U.S. stocks, leading investors to position themselves for year-end gains. This trend is attributed to seasonal tailwinds and post-September rebounds. Tech stocks are rallying in October due to these factors.

data.title: Sharps Technology (NASDAQ: STSS) to repurchase $100M of stock, partners with Crypto.com for Solana strategy. Sharps bought 2M Solana tokens.
data.description: Sharps Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: STSS) disclosed plans to buy back $100 million of its stock through open-market purchases and negotiated transactions. Additionally, the company is broadening its digital asset strategy focused on Solana in collaboration with Crypto.com. Crypto.com will offer custody, liquidity, and over-the-counter trading services. This advancement underscores Sharps' dedication to decentralized finance. Moreover, Sharps has acquired over 2 million Solana tokens (CRYPTO: SOL/USD). For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global Drone-as-a-Service market projected to hit $27 billion by 2033, driving industry transformation.
data.description: In recent reports from New York on October 2, 2025, it has been noted that the worldwide market for Drones-as-a-Service is anticipated to maintain a significant growth trajectory in the upcoming years. Drones-as-a-Service (DaaS) is revolutionizing various industries through the provision of scalable aerial drone services. This trend is expected to gain further traction, providing businesses with innovative solutions for their operations and development.

data.title: Blenders Eyewear and Keep A Breast team up for Breast Cancer Awareness with Millenia DX sunglasses. All profits go to Keep A Breast.
data.description: Blenders Eyewear, a prominent eyewear brand owned by Safilo Group, has announced its collaboration with Keep A Breast. The company is introducing the Millenia DX – Keep A Breast, a special limited-edition style to support the cause. All profits from the sales of these glasses will go towards supporting Keep A Breast. This initiative aims to raise awareness and provide assistance to those affected.
